prose: Frontier-orbital calculation on formaldehyde (H₂C=O) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral closed-shell singlet). Geometry taken from the user-supplied formaldehyde.xyz without re-optimization (single-point on supplied geometry). SCF converged in 8 cycles. No warnings reported. The engine's integrity checker returned trustworthy: true (all checks passed). HOMO = −7.6523067 eV (orbital index 7), LUMO = −1.7826355 eV (orbital index 8), HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.8696712 eV. Koopmans vertical IP = 7.6523 eV, vertical EA = 1.7826 eV. These are orbital energies (Koopmans theorem), not excitation energies. Total electronic energy = −114.55325 Eh. System has 4 atoms (O, C, H, H), 8 occupied orbitals, 74 total orbitals.
